name: 5-Wick Rustic Ceramic Salt Scalloped Jar Candle Cream 32oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Farmhouse Decor, Sea Salt Scent
description:
Feel fresh and create a pleasing ambience by lighting up the 32-Ounce 5-Wick Rustic Ceramic Salt Scalloped Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This jar candle showcases a scalloped exterior for decorative appeal and has a sea salt smell for a calming vibe. This ceramic jar candle is filled with a mix of palm, paraffin and soy wax, and burns for around 32 hours.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
